# Traderns varning: ”Börsen ska ner runt 10 procent – ordentlig urblåsning"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-06-17  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

Guest David Bagge (CEO of MarketMate) argues the recent ceasefire was largely priced in and that the broad rally has been driven almost entirely by US AI mega-caps amid weak market breadth and 2009-level consumer confidence. He forecasts a sharp ~10% 'washout' correction over the next 4-5 weeks ahead of earnings season, which he frames as a tactical buying opportunity for a rebound toward August/September. The view is directional on indices (S&P 500, OMX) rather than individual stocks.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
